SELECT DISTINCT tan(x) FROM test_tan WHERE x < 2;
SELECT tan(x) AS tangent_value FROM (SELECT x FROM test_tan WHERE x > 0) AS temp;
SELECT x, tan(x) AS tangent_value FROM test_tan WHERE x IN (SELECT x FROM test_tan WHERE x < 1);
CREATE TABLE another_table (a FLOAT, b FLOAT);
SELECT atanh((SELECT tan(a) FROM another_table)) AS atanh_of_tan;
SELECT tan(SELECT MAX(x) FROM test_tan) AS max_tan_value;
SELECT x, tan(COALESCE(NULLIF(x, 0), 1)) AS safe_tan FROM test_tan;
SELECT tan(x) OVER (PARTITION BY x ORDER BY x) FROM test_tan;
SELECT AVG(tan(x)) AS average_tan FROM (SELECT x FROM test_tan) AS subquery;
